nodes.title: ADR-0066: Agent semantic retrieval over the knowledge graph
ADR-0067: Standardize Hub engagement mechanisms (signals / reminders / dismiss-state)
ADR-0068: Pricing v4 — ₴199/міс, зворотній trial, уточнені ліміти Free/Pro
ADR-0069: AI-PR Checklist and validation workflow
ADR-0071: Dynamic agent snapshot for harness context
ADR-0072: Harness versioning and A/B evaluation
ADR-0073: Generic dual-write framework для 4 модульних пайплайнів
ADR-0074: Backend hosting — Hetzner VPS + Coolify (замість Railway)
DB types: coerce `bigint` to `number` in serializers
Lifecycle markers — every file/doc declares its status
Module-accent containment — no foreign accents inside a module subtree
Visible focus indicators must use `focus-visible:`, not `focus:`
Read governance before coding; update docs alongside code; internal docs in Ukrainian
Module-size discipline — `max-lines: 600` for web TS/TSX and server TS/JS
Strict-mode flag canonical — `noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true` по всьому monorepo
RQ keys: only via centralized factories
Skill body security scan — no injection/exfiltration patterns in SKILL.md
Archive-move depth integrity — no broken `../X` links in docs archives
Catalogs registered in `knowledge-graph.json` must have a `--check` generator
Auto-generated docs must start with `<!-- AUTO-GENERATED -->` marker
Merged PRs touching canonical docs must update `docs/04-governance/pr-ledger/index.json`
API contract: server response shape ↔ `api-client` types ↔ test
SQL migrations: sequential, no gaps, two-phase for DROP
Pre-commit hooks via Husky — do not skip
Tailwind colour-opacity steps must be on the registered scale
Saturated brand fills behind `text-white` must use the `-strong` companion
0006 — Frontend routing migration + route-based code-split
nodes.status: Withdrawn — обов'язкові routing-фази виконано; залишкові optional loader/bundle tuning не виправдовують продовження окремої ініціативи.

nodes.title: 0010 — Revenue-first launch: ship paid, focus wedge
0015 — Docs automation for daily ops
nodes.status: In progress — **Phase 1 + Phase 2 code-complete.** Phase 2 (Bundle Beta) shipped: skill+playbook columns + `agent-ready` field on all initiatives + `lint:initiative-agent-ready` gate. Remaining = Phase 1 **observational acceptance only** (maintainer 5/7-day `today.md` usage self-report). **7-day consecutive-green streak MET** for `docs-daily-brief.yml`: green 2026-07-02 → 2026-07-09 (8 runs) after fail 2026-07-01. **Cron removed on purpose** 2026-07-09 (`dca267eeb` — Actions-minutes hygiene; workflow лишився `workflow_dispatch`-only). Це пояснює відсутність schedule-runs після 07-09 — не broken cron. Stays In progress until self-report closes.

nodes.title: Fix Failing CI on a PR
Council — рада директорів для product рішень
Squad deliver — sequential cross-surface feature delivery
Squad QA — паралельний QA по всіх surfaces
Squad review — паралельний PR review через 4 lens-агентів
Security pen-test checklist for closed hardening cards
Write or Debug a Playwright E2E Test

meta.description: Use when editing Sergeant auth — login, signup, session cookies, middleware, account lifecycle, Better Auth wiring; also when touching protected routes or token refresh; UA: правиш логін, реєстрацію, сесії, авторизацію.
Backend architecture patterns — Clean Architecture, Hexagonal, CQRS, Event Sourcing, Temporal, Saga, microservices. UA: архітектура бекенду, мікросервіси, event sourcing.

Use when fixing a Sergeant bug, regression, flaky test, broken deploy, or production issue — even if the fix seems obvious, always reproduce first; UA: фіксиш баг, регресію, флакі-тест, зламаний деплой.

Use when the founder needs a multi-perspective advisory board — spawns council specialists in parallel (product, ux, growth, tech, critic) and synthesizes recommendations; UA: скликай раду / порадься з командою.

Use when changing Sergeant SQL, Postgres schema, query behavior, migration numbering, or Coolify pre-deploy data paths; also when adding indexes or fixing query perf; UA: правиш SQL, схему БД, міграції, rollout даних.

Use when implementing a Sergeant feature across 2+ surfaces with contract dependencies (DB + server + api-client + web/mobile) — sequential subagent handoffs prevent bigint and triplet gaps; UA: фіча через 2+ surfaces.

Use when a Sergeant change touches deploy config, env vars, Coolify/Vercel, health checks, Sentry, n8n, or production verification; also when editing CI/CD or Dockerfile; UA: деплой, env, Coolify, Vercel, Sentry, n8n.
Use when writing, reviewing, or debugging Playwright E2E tests in apps/web; for auth fixtures, network mocking, trace debugging, or CI retry config; UA: Playwright, E2E тести, e2e, smoke test.

Use when building a new Sergeant feature, screen, endpoint, workflow, or behavior change needing design, planning, tests, docs, and verification — even if scope looks small; UA: робиш нову фічу/екран/endpoint.

Use when creating, modifying, reviewing, or debugging Sergeant HubChat tool defs, executors, action cards, or chat side effects; also when editing AI prompts or stream; UA: правиш HubChat tool/executor/action card/chat.

Use when editing Sergeant Expo screens, React Native, mobile navigation, MMKV flows, Capacitor shell, or web→mobile ports; also for platform-specific bugs; UA: правиш Expo/RN/MMKV/Capacitor/mobile-shell.

Use when a Sergeant change spans multiple apps/packages, extracts shared logic, or import boundaries are unclear — even if the change seems isolated to one app; UA: межі між app/package, спільна логіка в монорепо.

Use when executing a batch of N open tasks from docs/90-work/planning/* PR-plans — dynamic selection, parallel agent fan-out, tracker updates, fast-forward archival of complete docs; UA: виконати батч planning-тасків.
Use when running full QA across all Sergeant surfaces — spawns qa-server, qa-web, qa-mobile as Agent Team in parallel and synthesizes per-surface results; UA: повний QA по всіх surfaces.

Use when reviewing a Sergeant PR, preparing for merge, checking commit scope, validating docs freshness, or deciding if a change is safe to ship; also for rollback safety checks; UA: ревʼю PR і мердж.

Use for Sergeant PR review touching 3+ governed surfaces — spawns 4 Agent Team reviewers (contract, design, security, docs) in parallel then synthesizes; UA: ревʼю PR через 3+ governed surfaces паралельно.

Use when running a security review of Sergeant code or API, auditing deps with pnpm audit, or checking PAT/credential safety; before any auth or user-data surface ships; UA: security review, перевірка безпеки, аудит.

Use when editing Sergeant server routes, serializers, modules, api-client types, React Query server hooks, or time-sensitive logic; also for middleware or env changes; UA: правиш роути/серіалізатори/RQ-хуки.

Use when starting any task in the Sergeant repo — web, server, mobile, migrations, HubChat, deploys, reviews, or cross-package boundaries; always load this skill first; UA: будь-яка нова задача в Sergeant.

Use when reducing technical debt, cleaning dead code with Knip, lowering ESLint baseline violations, or tackling Hard Rule #18 (module-size) refactor sprints in Sergeant; UA: технічний борг, dead code, рефакторинг.
Use before claiming any task done/green/fixed in Sergeant — run the proving command fresh and quote its output, never a scoped-filter or assumed pass; UA: перед «готово/зелено/пофіксив».

Use when editing Sergeant web UI, PWA shell, React screens, Tailwind, accessibility, localStorage flows, or shared web interaction patterns; also for design tokens or theme; UA: правиш веб-UI/PWA/Tailwind.
Use when creating, editing, or pressure-testing a `.agents/skills/*/SKILL.md` in Sergeant — applies TDD to skill content; UA: пишеш або редагуєш SKILL.md.
